mapper.select: SELECT QUSTNR_TMPLAT_IMAGE_INFO QUSTNR_TMPLAT_IMAGE_INFOPATHNM FROM LETTNQUSTNRTMPLAT WHERE QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = #{qestnrTmplatId}

SELECT QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY qestnrTmplatTy, DATE_FORMAT(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_IMAGE_INFO qestnrTmplatImagepathnm, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_DC qestnrTmplatCn, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_PATH_NM qestnrTmplatCours FROM LETTNQUSTNRTMPLAT WHERE QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = #{qestnrTmplatId}

SELECT A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY qestnrTmplatTy, DATE_FORMAT(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, (SELECT USER_NM FROM COMVNUSERMASTER WHERE ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) FRST_REGISTER_NM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_IMAGE_INFO qestnrTmplatImagepathnm, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_DC qestnrTmplatCn, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_PATH_NM qestnrTmplatCours FROM LETTNQUSTNRTMPLAT A WHERE 1=1
AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_DC LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNQUSTNRTMPLAT WHERE 1=1
AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_DC LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
